title: SseFrameTooLarge and invalid-UTF-8 SSE paths have no tests
description: subscribe_events() in client.rs has two error paths with no test coverage: (1) buf.len() > 1024*1024 returns ClientError::SseFrameTooLarge (primary defense against hostile server OOM attack); (2) String::from_utf8 failure returns ClientError::Parse('invalid UTF-8 in SSE stream') (stated policy to reject rather than replace). Neither is exercised by any test. A regression silently removes the guard.
